creatures.name: Goblin
creatures.summary: Small goblinoid creature, often found in caves or ruins. Goblins are cowardly but cunning, preferring to ambush prey.

creatures.name: Kobold
creatures.summary: Reptilian humanoid with a draconic bent. Kobolds are tribal and highly organized, known for setting traps.

creatures.name: Orc
creatures.summary: Fierce warrior with green skin and tusks. Orcs are proud and aggressive, favoring melee combat.

creatures.name: Skeleton
creatures.summary: Animated bones held together by dark magic. Skeletons are mindless servants of necromancers.

creatures.name: Zombie
creatures.summary: Shambling corpse reanimated by necrotic magic. Slow but relentless, immune to fear.

creatures.name: Ghoul
creatures.summary: Undead creature that feeds on corpses. Frightfully intelligent and creates more ghouls with its bite.

creatures.name: Hobgoblin
creatures.summary: Disciplined warrior with gray skin, more organized and tactical than their goblin cousins.

creatures.name: Bandit
creatures.summary: Seasoned criminal who lives by stealing and violence. Often found in roving bands.

creatures.name: Guard
creatures.summary: Trained warrior serving a lord or organization. Well-equipped and disciplined.

creatures.name: Wyvern
creatures.summary: Two-legged draconic creature with a venomous tail. Territorial and intelligent, found in mountain lairs.

creatures.name: Young Red Dragon
creatures.summary: Immature red dragon with arrogant personality. Breathes fire and commands respect through fear.

creatures.name: Adult Red Dragon
creatures.summary: Eldest of red dragons, a tyrant of flame and devastation. Legendary in scale and power.

creatures.name: Blue Dragon Wyrmling
creatures.summary: Newborn blue dragon with arrogant demeanor. Breathes lightning and seeks to dominate.

creatures.name: Green Dragon Wyrmling
creatures.summary: Young green dragon, a cunning manipulator and lover of intrigue. Breathes poison.

creatures.name: White Dragon Wyrmling
creatures.summary: Young white dragon, least intelligent of its kind. Breathes cold and dwells in icy wastelands.

creatures.name: Beholder
creatures.summary: Spherical creature with many magical eye-stalks. Paranoid and arrogant tyrant of the Underdark.

creatures.name: Lich
creatures.summary: Powerful wizard who achieved immortality through dark magic and the use of a phylactery.

creatures.name: Vampire
creatures.summary: UndeadAristorat who feeds on blood. Regenerates wounds and hypnotizes prey.

creatures.name: Ghost
creatures.summary: Spirit of a deceased humanoid unable to rest. Ethereal and can possess the living.

creatures.name: Wraith
creatures.summary: Wraith-like undead creature born from malice. Drains life force with a single touch.

creatures.name: Mummy
creatures.summary: Preserved corpse wrapped in burial shrouds. Guarded tombs for centuries, radiates curse.

creatures.name: Demon (Balrog-like)
creatures.summary: Towering demonic entity wreathed in flame. Embodies fury and destruction.

creatures.name: Devil (Pit Fiend)
creatures.summary: Infernal aristocrat commanding legions of lesser devils. Master of deception and binding.

creatures.name: Imp
creatures.summary: Small demonic servant bound in service for centuries. Loyal yet mischievous familiar.

creatures.name: Succubus
creatures.summary: Seductive demoness who drains essence through charm and deception.

creatures.name: Giant Spider
creatures.summary: Enormous arachnid with venomous bite. Dwells in dark caverns and webs.

creatures.name: Manticore
creatures.summary: Lion-bodied creature with human head and scorpion tail. Aggressive hunter.

creatures.name: Basilisk
creatures.summary: Reptilian creature whose gaze can turn victims to stone. Lethal predator of the Underdark.

creatures.name: Medusa
creatures.summary: Cursed woman with serpents for hair. Her gaze petrifies the living.

creatures.name: Mimic
creatures.summary: Shape-shifter that mimics furniture and objects. Often presented as an ambush predator.

creatures.name: Gelatinous Cube
creatures.summary: Transparent, cubic ooze that consumes everything in its path. Dungeon cleaner and predator.

creatures.name: Black Pudding
creatures.summary: Corrosive ooze that dissolves organic matter. Splits when damaged.

creatures.name: Rust Monster
creatures.summary: Armored creature that oxidizes metal. Terrifying to adventurers with magical equipment.

creatures.name: Griffon
creatures.summary: Eagle-headed lion with wings. Noble and intelligent creature; sometimes befriended.

creatures.name: Chimera
creatures.summary: Hybrid creature with lion body, goat head, and serpent tail. Fiercely territorial.

creatures.name: Hydra
creatures.summary: Multi-headed serpent that regenerates severed heads. Legendary creature of swamps.

creatures.name: Medusa
creatures.summary: Woman cursed with serpents for hair. Her petrifying gaze and serpent bite are deadly.

creatures.name: Troll
creatures.summary: Regenerating giant with voracious hunger. Only fire and acid prevent its healing.

creatures.name: Hill Giant
creatures.summary: Largest of giants in many regions. Brutish and prone to raiding villages.

creatures.name: Fire Giant
creatures.summary: Masterful warrior dwelling in volcanic realms. Commands fire and leads armies.

creatures.name: Frost Giant
creatures.summary: Icy brutish giant from frozen lands. Immune to cold and commands respect.

creatures.name: Cyclops
creatures.summary: One-eyed giant of legendary strength and stubbornness. Often controls territory.

creatures.name: Pixie
creatures.summary: Diminutive fey creature with magical powers. Mischievous and whimsical.

creatures.name: Unicorn
creatures.summary: Noble magical horse with healing horn. Serves good and fights evil.

creatures.name: Pegasus
creatures.summary: Winged horse of grace and beauty. Often serves heroes and good-aligned powers.

creatures.name: Phase Spider
creatures.summary: Interdimensional spider that phases between planes. Difficult to kill.

creatures.name: Mind Flayer
creatures.summary: Tentacled alien creature with psychic powers. Commands thralls from Underdark cities.

creatures.name: Aboleth
creatures.summary: Ancient slime lord dwelling in underground waters. Telepathic and manipulative.

creatures.name: Drow
creatures.summary: Dark elf dwelling in the Underdark. Skilled fighter with magical leanings.

creatures.name: Drow Mage
creatures.summary: Powerful dark elf spellcaster. Commands magic and leads drow military forces.

creatures.name: Bugbear
creatures.summary: Large goblinoid with feline features. Fierce and cruel, often leaders among goblins.

creatures.name: Gnoll
creatures.summary: Hyena-headed humanoid prized for strength and ferocity. Often raids settlements.

creatures.name: Werewolf
creatures.summary: Human who transforms into dire wolf form. Cursed by bite or dark magic.

creatures.name: Werebear
creatures.summary: Human who transforms into giant bear. Stronger than werewolves, often noble.

creatures.name: Harpy
creatures.summary: Woman with bird wings and talons. Known for aerial combat and enchanting songs.

creatures.name: Owlbear
creatures.summary: Fearsome hybrid of owl and bear. Possesses keen senses and devastating strength.

creatures.name: Dire Wolf
creatures.summary: Preternatural wolf the size of a horse. Cunning predator of the wilderness.

creatures.name: Wyvern
creatures.summary: Two-legged dragon with venomous tail sting. Territorial flier of mountain peaks.

creatures.name: Pseudodragon
creatures.summary: Tiny dragonlike creature used as familiar by spellcasters. Venomous tail spike.

creatures.name: Nightmare
creatures.summary: Demonic steed engulfed in smoke and flame. Carries infernal riders across planes.

creatures.name: Shadow
creatures.summary: Incorporeal shade spawn from negative planes. Saps strength with touch.

creatures.name: Specter
creatures.summary: Malevolent spirit of a fallen warrior. Possesses and drains life force.

creatures.name: Mummy Lord
creatures.summary: Powerful pharaoh-mummy risen from death. Commands undead minions and curses.

creatures.name: Ancient White Dragon
creatures.summary: Eldest of white dragons, dwelling in frozen wastelands. Brute force incarnate.

creatures.name: Ancient Gold Dragon
creatures.summary: Legendary dragon of good, rare and powerful. Champion of justice and nobility.

creatures.name: Lamia
creatures.summary: Woman with lion body below the waist. Seductive shape-shifter and manipulator.

creatures.name: Sphinx
creatures.summary: Legendary creature with feline body and humanoid torso. Keeper of secrets and riddles.

creatures.name: Roper
creatures.summary: Tentacled predator anchored to dungeon ceiling. Waits patiently for prey.

creatures.name: Purple Worm
creatures.summary: Enormous burrowing worm of the Underdark. Devours everything in its path.

creatures.name: Stirge
creatures.summary: Tiny bloodsucking creature resembling a mosquito. Often found in swarms.

creatures.name: Swarm of Rats
creatures.summary: Dangerous collective of rodents with collective intelligence. Spreads disease.

creatures.name: Swarm of Bats
creatures.summary: Coordinated swarm of flying mammals. Collective attacks overwhelm opponents.

creatures.name: Stone Golem
creatures.summary: Magically animated stone guardian. Immune to magic and unstoppable in direct combat.

creatures.name: Iron Golem
creatures.summary: Magical iron construct of immense power. Immune to most magic.

creatures.name: Clay Golem
creatures.summary: Humanoid golem crafted from clay. Symbol on forehead controls its actions.

creatures.name: Flesh Golem
creatures.summary: Grotesque being stitched from corpse parts. Animated by lightning magic.

creatures.name: Homunculus
creatures.summary: Tiny magical construct crafted to serve its creator. Expendable familiar.

creatures.name: Invisible Stalker
creatures.summary: Invisible air elemental conjured to hunt prey. Perfect killer.

creatures.name: Water Elemental
creatures.summary: Sentient mass of water manifested with destructive intent. Controls its aqueous form.

creatures.name: Fire Elemental
creatures.summary: Sentient flame that consumes and burns. Immune to fire damage.

creatures.name: Air Elemental
creatures.summary: Vortex of wind given form. Whirlwind of devastating force.

creatures.name: Earth Elemental
creatures.summary: Boulder-like creature of living stone. Submerges in earth effortlessly.

creatures.name: Giant Ape
creatures.summary: Enormous primate with frightening intelligence and strength. Territorial and protective.

creatures.name: Ancient Green Dragon
creatures.summary: Master of deception and intrigue dwelling in deep forests. Schemes endlessly.

creatures.name: Ancient Blue Dragon
creatures.summary: Tyrant of lightning commanding vast aerial domain. Arrogant and deadly.

creatures.name: Erinyes
creatures.summary: Infernal fury disguised as winged woman. Hunts targets relentlessly for revenge.

creatures.name: Oni
creatures.summary: Japanese demon in humanoid form. Master of deception and illusion.

creatures.name: Couatl
creatures.summary: Feathered serpent of good alignment. Protector of the innocent and wise counselor.

creatures.name: Demon Lord (Balor)
creatures.summary: Towering demon of terrible might and malice. Commands legions and spreads destruction.

creatures.name: Yuan-ti Abomination
creatures.summary: Serpent-folk hybrid of a sorcerous cult. Blends blood magic with reptilian cunning.

creatures.name: Medusa
creatures.summary: Woman with living serpents for hair whose gaze turns victims to stone.

creatures.name: Remorhaz
creatures.summary: Massive worm tunneling through frozen wastes. Hibernates for decades between hunts.

creatures.name: Tarrasque
creatures.summary: The ultimate doomsday beast. Nearly impossible to kill, sleeps for centuries.

creatures.name: Chimera
creatures.summary: Twisted monster with body of goat, head of lion and dragon. Breathes fire.

creatures.name: Hydra
creatures.summary: Many-headed dragon with regenerating heads. Each severed head regrows as two.

creatures.name: Nagas (Ancient)
creatures.summary: Immortal serpents of serpentine form. Possess ancient magic and wisdom.

creatures.name: Clay Golem
creatures.summary: Magically animated earthen construct. Indestructible but slow to respond.

creatures.name: Iron Golem
creatures.summary: Massive metal guardian bound by ancient magic. Almost impossible to destroy.

creatures.name: Pit Fiend
creatures.summary: Infernal lord of devils commanding armies of lesser fiends. Ruthlessly evil.

creatures.name: Marid
creatures.summary: Genie of water wielding elemental power. Proud, temperamental, and noble.
